title: gladiolus excelsus
intro: Gladiolus excelsus, also known as the "sword lily," is a species of flowering plant in the genus Gladiolus, characterized by its tall, upright stems and vibrant, trumpet-shaped flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been employed to treat various health issues such as wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gladiolus excelsus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and fever. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
